characters.name: HAIDER
characters.personality: Aggressive and cocky, values brute force over skill. A hot-headed rival who underestimates others.
characters.appearance: A young man with sharp features, wearing a red leather racing jacket and dark jeans. He has a determined, angry look.
characters.style_reference: Cinematic street racing, deep focus, sharp backgrounds, intense lighting, focus on red high-performance sports cars.

dialogue_samples.line: "Hadi needs to learn his place. He won't know what hit him."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER in a dimly lit alley, his face lit by the red glow of his car's taillights.

dialogue_samples.line: "You're dead meat at the starting line, Hadi!"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER leaning against his red sports car, pointing aggressively.

characters.name: IQRASH
characters.personality: Haider's loyal but equally arrogant friend. He follows Haider's lead and enjoys intimidation.
characters.appearance: Slightly taller than Haider, wearing a black racing hoodie and cargo pants. He has a smirk that rarely leaves his face.
characters.style_reference: Street racing aesthetic, deep focus, sharp backgrounds, gritty urban environment, detailed car interiors.

dialogue_samples.line: "Let's just settle this now. Why wait?"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH standing beside Haider, arms crossed, looking menacing.

characters.name: HAMMAD
characters.personality: Wise, calm, and strategic. He prefers competition over street brawls and acts as a mediator.
characters.appearance: A calm-looking man with glasses and a grey sweater. He has a mature presence and looks older than the others.
characters.style_reference: Cinematic drama, deep focus, sharp backgrounds, soft lighting in shadows, detailed character expressions.

dialogue_samples.line: "Fighting is for amateurs. If you really want to humiliate him, beat him in the annual race."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD stepping out from the shadows into the light, a knowing smile on his face.

characters.name: HADI
characters.personality: The underdog with incredible talent. He is humble, focused, and determined to prove his skill.
characters.appearance: A lean young man with a focused gaze, wearing a blue racing suit. He looks calm even under pressure.
characters.style_reference: Heroic cinematic shots, deep focus, sharp backgrounds, neon city lights, focus on a sleek blue high-performance racing car.

dialogue_samples.line: "The race will decide everything. See you at the finish line."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI checking the engine of his sleek blue racing car, wiping grease from his hands.

dialogue_samples.line: "I knew I could do it. Skill beats anger every time."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI in the driver's seat, the city lights reflecting in his eyes as he crosses the finish line.
